_meta.summary: Create a new checkout session — minimal valid payload (ucp_request: create)
_meta.source: schemas/shopping/checkout.json with ucp_request: create annotations honored
_meta.validates_against_note: The upstream UCP checkout schema uses a single schema for BOTH request and response wire directions, with `ucp_request: omit|optional|required` annotations indicating per-direction field requirements. JSON Schema validators cannot honor those annotations natively, so this request fixture intentionally has no `validates_against` — fields that the schema marks `required` (id, status, totals, links) are server-emitted (ucp_request: omit) and therefore absent from a valid create-checkout request. A ucp-request-aware validator that strips ucp_request:omit fields from `required` before validation is a future enhancement.
